description: Designed and built a modular end-to-end (E2E) test framework for Self-Hosted Sentry, reducing test execution time to 3 minutes through asynchronous execution. Enabled continuous health monitoring via scheduled cron jobs. Automated test workflows to achieve a 10x speedup and integrated them with CI/CD pipelines. Provisioned SignalFx dashboards and detectors using Terraform, ensuring seamless observability integration.

Architected a serverless, event-driven microservices architecture on GCP, reducing potential idle-resource costs. Developed a scalable notification service supporting Email and SMS using event-driven serverless architecture. Integrated Stripe to enable subscription-based billing, building a secure and reliable payment workflow. Built Google Document AI resume parsing pipeline, achieving a 0.973 F1 score in structured data extraction. Engineered GitLab CI/CD pipelines, automating 100% of deployment workflows for 5+ microservices.
